title: Fig. 2. A-B in Species-level identification of trypanosomes infecting Australian wildlife by High-Resolution Melting - Real Time Quantitative Polymerase Chain Reaction (HRM-qPCR)
author: Keatley, S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. A-B: (A) Derivative melt curves of T. copemani, T. noyesi G8, T. vegrandis G7; (B) Derivative melt curves of T. microti, T. cruzi and T. rangeli.
